problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
